name: Numeral
description: End-to-end sales tax automation API for nexus detection, registrations, filing, and remittance.

seo.title: Numeral — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Numeral: End-to-end sales tax automation API for nexus detection, registrations, filing, and remittance.

when_to_use: Detecting US economic nexus automatically across 50 states
Filing and remitting sales tax for multi-state SaaS companies
Registering in new states triggered by nexus threshold breach
Automating end-to-end sales tax ops via API integration

pros: API-first US sales tax — nexus, registration, filing
Clean docs aimed at engineering teams
Fast onboarding for SaaS and e-commerce
cons: Primarily US — limited global VAT coverage
Pricing can scale steeply with states
review.verdict: A pragmatic, dev-friendly US sales tax API — strong alternative to Avalara for SaaS builders.
review.best_for: US SaaS and e-commerce engineering teams wanting programmable sales tax compliance.
review.not_for: Businesses needing deep multi-country VAT/GST coverage outside the US.
